reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark reviewed Family B dev/skill claims as satisfied only when a verified evidence bundle backs the binary-emitted contracts that the claim's constraint depends on. Skill-level execution proof is not required to satisfy the binary-emitted shape, and a live Cautilus Agent run remains the next deepening step.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim says the delegated autonomous-continuation budget must be written to the packet, which is a deterministic binary-emitted shape that the bundled tests verify directly.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: TestBuildClaimReviewInputCanFocusActionBucket proves the claim-review-input packet emits a reviewBudget object with the focused action bucket, so a delegated autonomous-continuation budget cannot be lost to operator memory.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Optional dev/skill fixture-smoke run can extend confidence to live skill behavior, but the deterministic packet contract is already proven.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names every field the deterministic refresh-plan packet must record; the bundled tests verify all of them (baseCommit, targetPolicy, changedSources, claimPlan lifecycle, staleEvidence reasons, workingTreePolicy).
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: TestBuildClaimRefreshPlanMarksChangedSources and TestBuildClaimRefreshPlanRecordsStaleEvidenceReasons together prove the refresh-plan packet records baseline commit, target policy, changed sources, carried-forward vs changed claim lifecycle, stale evidence reasons, and dirty-working-tree treatment.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Optional dev/skill fixture-smoke run can extend confidence to a live Cautilus Agent refresh selection, but the deterministic refresh-plan packet contract is already proven.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim says the improve proposal generator must not directly auto-edit consumer-owned files; the bundled tests verify the generator emits suggested changes without modifying target file contents.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: TestGenerateImproveProposalAddsPassingSimplificationForRuntimeChange and TestGenerateImproveProposalKeepsBaselineFollowUpForHoldWithoutSuggestedChanges prove improve proposals carry target-file metadata and suggested changes without mutating the target file, restoring the verified evidence that the earlier rename-only bundle left stale.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Live improve runner observation is optional once the deterministic generator boundary is proven; the adapter still owns end-to-end host-runner enforcement.
